name: compute_hash
description: Compute a hash of the input string. Supported algorithms: md5, sha256, sha1, fnv1a_custom, djb2_custom, sdbm_custom, murmur_custom, jenkins_custom.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm: md5, sha256, sha1, fnv1a_custom, djb2_custom, sdbm_custom, murmur_custom, jenkins_custom.
